description: Detects India-specific PII patterns hardcoded in source files — Aadhaar numbers, PAN, IFSC, UPI VPA, voter ID

patterns.name: Aadhaar number (12-digit, raw)
patterns.description: 12-digit number matching Aadhaar format found in source code or config. Raw Aadhaar must never be stored — store only masked form or UIDAI token.
patterns.note: Matches are passed through Verhoeff checksum validation in the scanner before reporting. False-positive rate is very low with validation.

patterns.name: PAN card number
patterns.description: Permanent Account Number (PAN) in standard Indian format. PAN found in source code may indicate hardcoded test data left in codebase or improper storage.
patterns.note: PAN is financial SPDI. Should never appear in source code. Check if it's a test PAN (AAAAA9999A is valid test pattern) and flag anyway.

patterns.name: Indian bank IFSC code
patterns.description: IFSC (Indian Financial System Code) in standard format. Found in code may indicate hardcoded account details.
patterns.note: IFSC alone is not highly sensitive but combined with account number constitutes financial SPDI.

patterns.name: UPI Virtual Payment Address (VPA)
patterns.description: UPI VPA in the format handle@bank or name@upi. Hardcoded VPAs in source indicate potential payment credential exposure.
patterns.note: High false-positive risk — email addresses also match. Scanner filters out common email domains (.com, .in, .org, .net, .gov) to reduce noise.

patterns.name: Indian mobile number
patterns.description: 10-digit mobile number starting with 6-9 (Indian mobile format). Hardcoded in source may indicate test data not cleaned up or improper storage.
patterns.note: High false-positive risk with numbers in other contexts (port numbers, IDs). Only flag when near context keywords like 'phone', 'mobile', 'contact', 'number'.

patterns.name: Voter ID number
patterns.description: Indian Voter ID (EPIC) number format: 3 letters + 7 digits.
patterns.note: Relatively low false-positive rate. Check context — if near 'voter', 'epic', 'election', flag as high confidence.
